macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US April Jobs Growth Tops Estimates, Unemployment Steady at 4.3%
items.summary: US nonfarm payrolls exceeded forecasts for April, driving stocks higher, while the unemployment rate remained unchanged at 4.3%. Wage growth came in slightly below expectations.

items.title: Fed Keeps Interest Rates Unchanged in Powell's Swan Song
items.summary: The Federal Reserve held rates steady, as highlighted in recent market commentary amid strong jobs data.

items.title: Stocks Climb on Strong April Employment Report
items.summary: Major stock indices rose as US jobs growth surpassed analyst expectations, with fundamentals outweighing headlines in the ongoing rally.

items.title: DXY Falls to 10-Week Low Amid US Economic Data
items.summary: The US dollar index dropped to a 10-week low following recent jobs and wage growth reports that were mixed relative to forecasts.

items.title: China Exports and Imports Hit Record Highs, Trade Surplus Beats Estimates
items.summary: China's exports climbed to a record peak and imports extended their record run, pushing the trade surplus above estimates.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Futures Liquidations Top $91M in 24 Hours as Shorts Dominate
items.summary: Over the past 24 hours, cryptocurrency futures saw $91.55 million in liquidations, primarily affecting short positions on Bitcoin ($31.84M, 53.57% shorts), Ethereum ($30.36M, 55.12% shorts), and Toncoin ($29.35M, 97.74% shorts). This indicates strong pressure on bearish traders amid persistent market imbalance.

items.title: SUI Token Surges Nearly 13% to Over $1.08 Amid Short Liquidations
items.summary: Sui (SUI) layer-1 blockchain token rallied nearly 13% to above $1.08 with a $4.35 billion market cap, driven by staking news and $3.13 million in derivatives liquidations, 90% from short positions. It became one of the top-performing major altcoins.

items.title: Australian Police Seize $4.1M in Bitcoin in Major Darknet Crackdown
items.summary: Australian authorities confiscated 52.3 BTC worth $4.1 million linked to a darknet marketplace after a 15-month investigation, arresting two men and seizing devices. This coincides with intensified AML scrutiny on crypto platforms ahead of 2027 regulations.

items.title: Bitcoin Stalls Near $80K as Spot ETFs See $268M Outflows
items.summary: Bitcoin price stagnated around $80,000 after rejection at $82,500, with US spot Bitcoin ETFs recording $268 million outflows amid trader anxiety. The stagnation follows recent volatility influenced by geopolitical tensions.

items.title: UBS Invests in XRP Signaling Institutional Interest
items.summary: Swiss financial giant UBS, managing $7 trillion, announced investment in XRP, boosting market interest in the cryptocurrency amid accelerating institutional adoption.

items.title: Tether Freezes Over $514M in USDT Across 370 Wallets
items.summary: Tether froze more than $514 million in USDT on Tron and Ethereum blockchains across 370 addresses in the past month, highlighting ongoing compliance efforts.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Canvas Learning Platform Hit by Cyberattack from ShinyHunters
items.summary: Canvas, used by nearly 9,000 schools and universities, was disrupted by a cyberattack during final exams but restored online on May 8, 2026; hacker group ShinyHunters claimed access to billions of private messages and records.

items.title: AI Skills Critical for Hiring Amid 42% Graduate Underemployment
items.summary: Clara Shih of the New Work Foundation states learning AI is essential for workers, as 42% of recent graduates remain underemployed, advocating for AI profitability benefiting everyone including the unemployed.

items.title: ServiceNow Knowledge 2026 Highlights Autonomous AI Agents and Security
items.summary: ServiceNow's Day 2 Keynote discusses rapid AI innovation, trustworthy AI, conversational analytics for decision-making, and fully autonomous AI agents transforming the security landscape.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: New VR Games Released: Flatout 4 Total Insanity VR, Spymaster, Evil Inside VR
items.summary: This week's VR releases include Flatout 4: Total Insanity VR for PCVR, Spymaster for Meta Quest, and Evil Inside VR for Meta Quest and PSVR 2. Additional news covers Hot Dogs, Horseshoes & Hand Grenades 2 and Compass coming to Quest and PCVR, with Memoreum on 50% sale.

items.title: Escape from Tarkov Updates: Unity 6 Upgrade, Console and Mobile Versions Planned
items.summary: Developers plan to update to Unity 6 on test servers to improve performance and reduce RAM usage, with console ports in development and a separate mobile version. Upcoming features include FSR 4.0, big Halloween event with zombies, and potential OG Factory map return.

items.title: Pokemon GO Leaks: Gold Bottle Cap Returning, GO Fest and Mega Evolutions
items.summary: Data mines reveal Gold Bottle Cap comeback and GO Fest details, with potential raid day for Meowscarada's mega evolution from Pokemon Legends EA possibly this year.

items.title: Cobra Kai 2: Dojos Rising Gets PS5 Upgrade in 2026 Lineup
items.summary: PS3 employee-only console video highlights upcoming 2026 releases including Cobra Kai 2: Dojos Rising with a PS5 upgrade, alongside more 2K WWE games.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Instagram Removes End-to-End Encryption from Direct Messages
items.summary: Instagram has discontinued end-to-end encryption for DMs, allowing Meta access to chat content, effective immediately. Users are warned of the privacy change as reported across multiple outlets.

items.title: Nintendo Raises Switch 2 Prices Amid Chip Crisis
items.summary: Nintendo is increasing prices for the Switch 2 due to ongoing chip shortages, despite selling 19.86 million units last year, with forecasts for lower sales next year.

items.title: Intel Signs Preliminary Deal to Produce Chips for Apple
items.summary: Intel has reportedly entered a preliminary agreement to manufacture chips for Apple, echoing past partnerships amid current supply chain shifts.

items.title: Instructure Hackers Claim Data Theft from 9,000 Schools, Disrupt Canvas Platform
items.summary: Hackers targeting Instructure claim to have stolen data from nearly 9,000 schools and locked students out of the Canvas platform, demanding negotiation by May 12.

items.title: Canvas Education Platform Hacked, Disrupting US Schools
items.summary: The parent company of Canvas suffered a cybersecurity incident, causing widespread disruptions for schools across the US and locking students out of the platform.

items.title: cPanel and WHM Release Fixes for Three New Vulnerabilities
items.summary: cPanel has issued patches for three newly discovered vulnerabilities in cPanel and WHM; users are urged to update immediately to mitigate risks.

items.title: Discord Suffers Outage Taking Users Offline
items.summary: Discord experienced a major outage due to API system issues, temporarily taking some users offline before services were restored.

items.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch Can Predict Fainting Up to 5 Minutes in Advance
items.summary: Samsung claims its Galaxy Watch can detect signs of fainting up to five minutes ahead, introducing advanced health monitoring capabilities.

items.title: Apple AirPods with Built-in Camera in Final Testing
items.summary: Gurman reports that Apple AirPods featuring a built-in camera are currently in the final testing stage, signaling potential new features.

items.title: Sony Partners with TSMC for Image Sensor Production
items.summary: Sony is collaborating with TSMC to produce image sensors at a new facility, aiming to enhance manufacturing capabilities.
